summary: Fresh rocprofv3 evidence for the current c8 auto path after c8 auto was moved from the per-row full-attention fallback to native full-attention row chunks of 2. Generated-token equality remains green, the trace launches the native batch full-attention context kernel, and it launches zero per-row full-attention context kernels. This remains non-retained because row chunking is a diagnostic fallback and native_caware_decode=false.
